CategoryOptionGroupOut.description:
A category's option group with its full option list. The category's groups
ARE its preset, so there is no per-dish ``enabled`` concept here.
CategoryOptionGroupOut.title: CategoryOptionGroupOut

schema.title: Response List Categories Api Admin Categories Get

get.description:
A category's option groups (its preset), each with its options, ordered by
``(sort_order, name)`` for both groups and options.

schema.title: Response Category Option Groups Api Admin Categories  Category Id  Option Groups Get

delete.description: Legacy clear: removes the cover image (promotes the next if any).

post.description: Legacy single-image upload: replaces the cover in place (never appends).

post.description:
Hand a DispatchPending order to the delivery provider.

On success: store the reference and advance to Delivering. On provider
failure: leave the order in DispatchPending so the admin can retry, and 502.

schema.title: Response Sales Report Api Admin Reports Sales Get

200.description: JSON rows, or a CSV attachment when format=csv.

Response List Incoming Orders Api Kitchen Orders Get

post.description:
K4 — manual Confirm Pickup fallback: ReadyForDispatch → Delivering,
attributed to the kitchen actor. No delivery-port call (the courier scan T2
is the path that's unavailable). Mirrors the accept verb's shape.
